properties.titulo_evento: Trump vows to seize Iran’s Kharg Island

properties.titulo_evento: China bars Philippines defence chief as South China Sea spat sails onwards
properties.descricao: Chinese individuals and organisations are also banned from doing business with Gilberto Teodoro and his family.

properties.titulo_evento: US-Iran war to pull global economy to post-COVID low: World Bank
properties.descricao: Global growth forecast cut to 2.5 percent due to surging energy prices, inflation and borrowing costs.

properties.descricao: Israel expands ground operations in southern Lebanon as ceasefire efforts remain stalled.

properties.descricao: After saying US would hit Iran 'very hard', Trump signals possible breakthrough in ceasefire negotiations.

properties.titulo_evento: Artan to referee Uefa Super Cup after losing World Cup role
properties.descricao: Somali referee Omar Artan is appointed to take charge of the Uefa Super Cup match between Paris St-Germain and Aston Villa later this summer after being denied a spot at the World Cup.

properties.titulo_evento: Watch: Historic US-Canada border library gets new Quebec-only entrance
properties.descricao: After more than a century of sharing the main entrance, Canadians were barred from using the library's US-side door by the Trump administration in 2025.

properties.titulo_evento: Egypt's delicate balancing act in the Iran war
properties.descricao: Cairo faces criticism from its Gulf allies that support against Iran has been lacking. But Egypt's priority is to shield its fragile economy from the fallout of a widening conflict.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war: Trump calls off threatened strikes, says deal nearly done
properties.descricao: Hours after promising to hit Iran "very hard," US President Trump has said he canceled the attacks, but added a naval blockade would remain in place. Follow DW for more.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran: From clerical rule to military capture
properties.descricao: The Iran war and the country's change of leadership are reshaping Iran's power structure. Analysts say the Revolutionary Guard is emerging as the dominant force, weakening the system's clerical foundations.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine: Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant's power cut off
properties.descricao: An attack near Europe's largest nuclear power plant in Russian-occupied Ukraine has caused an outage in the area. Meanwhile, a Ukrainian drone attack has sparked a fire at a refinery in southern Russia.

properties.titulo_evento: Hungary makes major deal with Ukraine, its former enemy
properties.descricao: Hungarian Prime Minister Magyar announced an agreement with Kyiv about rights for a Hungarian minority in Ukraine. It paves the way for Ukraine to start EU accession talks — unthinkable under Hungary's last PM Orban.

properties.titulo_evento: War in Ukraine: Kyiv strikes key Russian supply lines
properties.descricao: Russian troops rely on supplies via the land corridor to Crimea, but Ukrainian forces are now able to launch concentrated attacks along the critical route. Experts say this indicates growing Russian vulnerability.
